query: Use datocms-setup-contentful-import to install the DatoCMS Contentful import plugin, add env placeholders, and scaffold a local helper.
Please run datocms-setup-contentful-import in this repo. I want a lean one-shot Contentful onboarding flow into DatoCMS.
Invoke datocms-setup-contentful-import and add a datocms:import:contentful script that validates env vars before running.
Use datocms-setup-wordpress-import to wire a WordPress import helper.
How do I import Contentful content into DatoCMS with the CLI?
Set up named DatoCMS CLI profiles for staging and production.
